title: Youth Class Series # 2: Jacques Cheminade "New Fascism, Or New Mutual Development Architecture?"
description:
In this second class, Jacques Cheminade will expose the true nature of the new fascism and the alternative to it. Do the names David Sacks, the crypto king in the White House, Scott Bessent, Secretary of the Treasury, Stephen Miran, head of the Economic Analysis Council in the White House, Paul Atkins, head of the Security Exchange Commission, or especially Peter Thiel ring a bell? Yet these are the people who publicly believe they should be the masters of the world, along with their historical mentors in the City of London.

They are the ones who make money with money, with no investment in the physical world other than rearmament to impose their fake currency. They are the ones for whom Donald Trump and his family are puppets destined to rule through fear. We must respond with a policy of justice and national cohesion and, internationally, with a new architecture of mutual development and security for all, a benchmark and a horizon. As the poet Friedrich Schiller said: "What You Love, You Own; What You Hate, You Lose."
